motion: Should PR #28: epic: Frontend Scaffold & Integration be merged into main?

findings.description: selectTable error overwrites global error state, destroying working UI on single table load failure
findings.fix_description: Scope selectTable errors to a table-specific error variable instead of the global error that flips the entire UI to error state. Preserve previously-loaded table data on failure.

findings.description: Empty table list rendered in error state sidebar when tables array is empty
findings.rationale: Error card with retry button provides adequate UX for scaffold scope

findings.description: Duplicate table-list nav markup across error and normal branches
findings.rationale: Extract TableList.svelte component when table list gains features

findings.description: Mock generates only 50 rows regardless of table row_count_estimate
findings.rationale: Mock serves UI dev purposes; 50 rows sufficient for testing

findings.description: fetchStatus adds serial request to critical load path
findings.rationale: Status endpoint is lightweight; cleaner than inferring from API errors

findings.description: No loading state indicator during initial data fetch
findings.rationale: Acceptable for scaffold; loading states are Epic 3 polish

findings.description: Sidebar localStorage restore causes flash of expanded-to-collapsed on mount
findings.rationale: Cosmetic; could be fixed by reading localStorage before first render

merge_conditions: Fix selectTable error handling to not destroy working UI on single table load failure (finding 1)
follow_up_issues: Extract TableList.svelte to deduplicate nav markup (finding 3)
